message:
ux: trim ACMM intro modal text and add learning/practice/traceability (#8790)

Condense the verbose "What is ACMM" section into a single paragraph.
Add three new concept cards (Learning, Practice, Traceability) in a
responsive grid so users understand ACMM's value proposition at a
glance. Move all user-facing strings to i18n translation keys in
common.json under the acmmIntro namespace. Extract level definitions
and source framework badges into typed constants to eliminate
duplication and satisfy TypeScript strict mode.

Fixes #8776

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,11 @@ * AI Codebase Maturity Model is, the 5 levels, the 4 source frameworks, * and links to the underlying paper. * + * Key concepts introduced: + * - Learning — how ACMM helps teams learn AI-assisted development practices + * - Practice — the progression from ad-hoc to structured AI workflows + * - Traceability — the citation trail connecting feedback loops to evidence + * * Dismissal: the explicit Close button, the X in the header, and the * Escape key all close the modal. Backdrop click is still a no-op so * accidental taps (especially on mobile) don't dismiss before users @@ -18,12 +23,33 @@ */ import { useState } from 'react' -import { BarChart3, ExternalLink, 'acmmIntro.levelL2', descKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL2Desc' }, + { label: 'L3', nameKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL3', descKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL3Desc' }, + { label: 'L4', nameKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL4', descKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL4Desc' }, + { label: 'L5', nameKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL5', descKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL5Desc' }, + { label: 'L6', nameKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL6', descKey: 'acmmIntro.levelL6Desc' }, +] as const + export function isACMMIntroDismissed(): boolean { try { return localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) === '1' @@ -40,12 +66,21 @@ function dismissACMMIntro() { } } +/** Source framework badge definitions */ +const SOURCE_FRAMEWORKS = [ + { key: 'ACMM', i18nKey: 'sourceACMM', colorClasses: 'bg-primary/20 text-primary' }, + { key: 'Fullsend', i18nKey: 'sourceFullsend', colorClasses: enableBackspace={false} > @@ -77,114 +112,101 @@ export function ACMMIntroModal({ isOpen, onClose }: ACMMIntroModalProps) {
-

What is ACMM?

+

{t('acmmIntro.whatIsTitle')}

- The AI Codebase Maturity Model is a 6-level framework that scores how - ready your repository is for AI-assisted engineering. It looks for - concrete, detectable signals — instruction files, measurement - workflows, feedback loops, gating policies — and scores from{' '} - L1 Assisted / Ad Hoc (an AI - suggests completions) up to{' '} - L6 Fully Autonomous{' '} - (the codebase generates work, executes it, reviews it, and merges it - with minimal human intervention). A prerequisites tier tracks - foundational engineering hygiene without gating level progression. -

-

- The dashboard scans the repo's file structure, workflows, and - configuration to detect these signals. No source code is uploaded; - only public file paths are read. + {t('acmmIntro.whatIsBody')}

{/* The 6 levels */}
-

The 6 levels

+

{t('acmmIntro.levelsTitle')}

-
- L1 - Assisted / Ad Hoc - AI suggests completions, no persistent rules -
-
- L2 - Instructed - Judgment encoded in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / Copilot instructions -
-
- L3 - Measured / Enforced - Rules mechanically enforced; metrics instrument the loop -
-
- L4 - Adaptive / Structured - Metrics feed back into instructions; workflows are structured + {LEVELS.map(({ label, nameKey, descKey }) => ( +
+ + {label} + + + {t(nameKey)} + + + {t(descKey)} + +
+ ))} +
+

+ {t('acmmIntro.levelsNote')} +

+
+ + {/* Learning, Practice, Traceability — three key concepts */} +
+
+
+ +

{t('acmmIntro.learningTitle')}

-
- L5 - Semi-Automated - System detects + proposes — humans still approve +

+ {t('acmmIntro.learningBody')} +

+
+
+
+ +

{t('acmmIntro.practiceTitle')}

-
- L6 - Fully Autonomous - System acts — generates issues, merges PRs, rolls back; humans set policy +

+ {t('acmmIntro.practiceBody')} +

+
+
+
+ +

{t('acmmIntro.traceabilityTitle')}

+

+ {t('acmmIntro.traceabilityBody')} +

-

- L5 vs L6: at L5 the system proposes and humans approve. - At L6 the system acts and humans audit after the fact. -

{/* Source frameworks */}
-

Source frameworks

+

{t('acmmIntro.sourcesTitle')}

- ACMM aggregates criteria from four open-source frameworks. Each - criterion in the inventory is tagged with its source so you can - follow the citation trail back to the upstream definition. + {t('acmmIntro.sourcesBody')}

    -
  • - ACMM{' '} - — the 6-level model (L1–L6 + prerequisites) -
    • -
  • - Fullsend{' '} - — readiness + autonomy criteria (test coverage, CI/CD, auto-merge policy) -
    • -
  • - AEF{' '} - — Agentic Engineering Framework: governance criteria (task traceability, structural gates) -
    • -
  • - Reflect{' '} - — Claude Reflect: self-tuning criteria (correction capture, CLAUDE.md auto-sync) -
    • + {SOURCE_FRAMEWORKS.map(({ key, i18nKey, colorClasses }) => ( +
  • + {key}{' '} + {`\u2014 ${t(`acmmIntro.${i18nKey}`)}`} +
    • + ))}
{/* What you can do here */}
-

What you can do here

+

{t('acmmIntro.actionsTitle')}

    -
  • Type any owner/repo in the picker above to scan it.
    • -
  • See your role and the next transition trigger on the Your Role card.
    • -
  • Browse all detected vs missing criteria on the Feedback Loops Inventory card.
    • -
  • For any missing criterion, click Ask agent for help to launch an agent that adds it.
    • -
  • Generate a shields.io badge for your README from the picker — it updates as your score changes.
    • +
  • {t('acmmIntro.actionScan', { ownerRepo: 'owner/repo' })}
    • +
  • {t('acmmIntro.actionRole')}
    • +
  • {t('acmmIntro.actionInventory')}
    • +
  • {t('acmmIntro.actionAgent')}
    • +
  • {t('acmmIntro.actionBadge')}
@@ -197,7 +219,7 @@ export function ACMMIntroModal({ isOpen, onClose }: ACMMIntroModalProps) { className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-primary hover:underline text-xs" > - Read the paper on arXiv (2604.09388) + {t('acmmIntro.paperLink')} @@ -212,18 +234,17 @@ export function ACMMIntroModal({ isOpen, onClose }: ACMMIntroModalProps) { onChange={(e) => setDontShowAgain(e.target.checked)} className="rounded border-border accent-primary" /> - Don't show this again + {t('acmmIntro.dontShowAgain')} ) } -
